title: Lose Fat, Not Muscle: The Evidence-Based Cardio & Diet Guide
description: Cutting doesn't have to cost you your gains. Learn how to set your calorie deficit, protein target and cardio so the weight you lose is fat — not muscle. Click to read the full guide → #fatloss #losefat #cutting #caloriedeficit #musclebuilding #evidencebased #fitnessnutrition
